item.description:
macOS ↔ iOS feature parity

macOS

  • AirPlay output picker in the transport bar.
  • Offline downloads — a Downloads sidebar section, per-show download buttons, and a “Listen Offline” escape hatch when disconnected.
  • Now Playing window (⌥⌘P, or the expand button) — the full themed player, including the Receiver faceplate and the Click Wheel.

iOS / iPadOS

  • Hardware-keyboard shortcuts (iPad) — “/” search, Space play/pause, n/p skip, ←/→ seek, 0 and 1–9 jump.
  • Clear Queue from the Now Playing screen.

Plus fixes and polish.
